name: vocab-trainer
description: Vocab-Trainer MCP Server with Spaced Repetition

scripts.build:mcp: . scripts/env.sh && cd packages/vocab-mcp && bun run src/index.ts
scripts.build:api: . scripts/env.sh && cd packages/vocab-api && bun run src/server.ts
scripts.dev:mcp: . scripts/env.sh && cd packages/vocab-mcp && bun run src/index.ts
scripts.dev:api: . scripts/env.sh && cd packages/vocab-api && bun run src/server.ts
